hero.name: Antonio
hero.description:
I have 5+ years of experience in high-availability distributed systems. 
Specialized in Java and Spring Boot, with a focus on performance, scalability, and code quality.
Experience in architectural design applying hexagonal architecture and event-driven architecture, using Kafka to build decoupled and resilient systems.
I have an end-to-end vision thanks to my frontend experience with TypeScript, facilitating technical decisions aligned with the product.
Currently focused on evolving towards Software Architect roles, with special interest in integrating artificial intelligence in distributed systems.

about.description: Developer with over 5 years of experience working on projects aimed at creating secure, high-performance, and scalable solutions for companies across various sectors.

backend.title: Backend Development
backend.description: Expert in Java and the Spring Boot ecosystem (Data, Security, etc). Some experience with Node.js

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.description: Experience in designing modular monoliths with transition to microservices, hexagonal architecture, and clean architecture. Knowledge in event-driven architectures.

frontend.title: Frontend Development
frontend.description: +3 years of experience collaborating with frontend teams using tools like Angular and React.

android.title: Android Development
android.description: 3 years of experience in Android application development with Java and Android Studio

optimization.title: Optimization
optimization.description: Focus on performance, accessibility, and best practices to ensure fast and accessible applications.

projects.subtitle: A selection of my featured projects on GitHub
